feedback.text: The idea against side loading applications not only denies is from the freedom of choice, it essentially makes Android as closed as Apple ecosystem is. One of the core values of EU freedom is openness, including open source software. This initiative devices is from using true open source software. I can't develop small programs for my friends anymore without giving information to Google. Even in the US, the home country of Google it was decided that they have too much power, and in Europe we shouldn't allow it.
